arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Hefty price tag slapped on Viktor Gyokeres alternative as target makes admission
arts.sum: Manchester United are gearing up for the summer transfer window with Bournemouth's Antoine Semenyo among their targets as Ruben Amorim looks to bolster his forward line

arts.ttl: Man Utd issued Bruno Fernandes warning ahead of summer squad rebuild
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has become one of Manchester United’s most reliable players but a concerning trend is emerging regarding the Portuguese playmaker’s future at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe should ditch grim plan after Man Utd's epic European win
arts.sum: A task force commissioned by Sir Jim Ratcliffe and led by the likes of Sebastian Coe and Andy Burnham has decided the best course of action is to demolish Old Trafford and build a new stadium

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Wolves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Man Utd vs Wolves in the Premier League on Sunday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Frustrated Marseille fans demand Mason Greenwood 'get moving' with giant banner unfurled before game - and former Man United star responds by scoring TWICE in 5-1 rout
arts.sum: The former Manchester United forward has recently been the subject of several damning reports that have raised questions over his attitude at Marseille.

arts.ttl: Man United explore 'shock' Marcus Rashford swap deal that could harm Liverpool's transfer plans
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly give consideration to an audacious Marcus Rashford swap transfer which could also have an impact on Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Beni Baningime insists Hearts ARE fighting for Neil Critchley as Man Utd fan urges Jambos to avoid Old Trafford habit
arts.sum: Baningime insists it's on the players as well as he claims problems were evident at Hearts before Critchley was appointed

arts.ttl: Man United would be MAD to sell Kobbie Mainoo after his Lyon-taming act, writes DANNY MURPHY... Ruben Amorim must do all he can to keep him
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: Manchester United's incredible win against Lyon on Thursday night reminded us all it would be madness to let Kobbie Mainoo leave Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye Rashford-Watkins swap - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United are considering a swap deal involving Marcus Rashford and Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins, Alexander Isak is set to stay at Newcastle, Manchester City eye goalkeeper Diogo Costa, plus more.

arts.ttl: Diogo Dalot makes honest admission on Man Utd failure in warning to team-mates
arts.sum: Diogo Dalot accepts some of the criticism this season has been understandable given that Ruben Amorim’s men are on course for United’s worst finish of the Premier League era.
